meaning: n.[药]丙磺舒,羧苯磺丙胺(一种作用于肾管功能的药物)
examples: The results suggest that it may be appropriate to prescribe uric acid–lowering drugs, such as allopurinol and probenecid , to these otherwise healthy individuals.
Garzelli, winner of the 2001 race, was suspended in 2002 after testing positive for the banned diuretic probenecid.
These are oral medicines and include probenecid and benzbromarone.
